review_text: Bathroom was filthy and trash wasn't picked up for two days. Staff seemed annoyed when we asked for help.
Power kept tripping at our site and nobody came after hours. Ruined our stay.
Loud highway noise all night and dog park was a mud pit.
Reservation was wrong and we got a tiny back-in with no shade. Manager was dismissive.
Wi‑Fi was spotty and the pool was closed with no notice on the website.
Sites are tight and our neighbor's sewer connection smelled bad.
Check-in took 45 minutes. Nice location but operations need work.
Laundry machines were broken and the camp store prices felt excessive.
Decent stay—good dog walk area but the roads inside the park are rough.
Quiet at night which we loved. Bathhouse needs updating.
Friendly staff, but our site wasn't level and we had to use extra blocks.
Okay for an overnight. Playground was small for kids.
Clean restrooms, easy check-in, and great views. We'll be back.

Amazing location near the parks. Store had firewood and s'mores supplies.
Quiet wooded sites and helpful hosts. A bit pricey but worth it for the area.
Best KOA we've stayed at—immaculate facilities, heated pool, and genuinely kind team.
